title: Case 779: Human Cells Rained From the Sky
description: In 1994, gelatinous masses containing human white blood cells fell from the sky over Washington state for hours. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 779: Human Cells Rained From the Sky in 1994...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Department of the Unknown case file reveals the impossible: human biological material precipitating from the atmosphere. What fell over Oakville defies explanation. Subscribe for classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption: Human cells fell from the sky in 1994. For hours, gelatinous masses rained down over Washington state. Lab tests found human white blood cells inside. #horror #unexplained #scary #truecrime #paranormal

instagram_metadata.reels_caption: What would you do if human cells started falling from the sky? In 1994, that's exactly what happened over Oakville, Washington. Lab analysis confirmed the impossible. #horror #unexplained #scary #truecrime #paranormal #mystery #creepy

facebook_metadata.reels_caption: In 1994, something impossible happened over a small Washington town. Human cells began falling from the sky.

x_twitter_metadata.main_tweet: August 7, 1994: Human white blood cells fell from the sky over Washington state for several hours. #horror #unexplained #truecrime
